description: Examination of issues and theories in gender and science. Topics include historical and contemporary studies of technoscientific and medical constructions of sex/gender differences; feminist studies of science, technology, and medicine; proposals of new epistemologies.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Junior standing andSOC/​C&E SOC  475,GEN&WS 441,GEN&WS 445, or GENWS 477 or graduate/professional standing

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Junior standing andSOC/​C&E SOC  475,GEN&WS 441,GEN&WS 445, or GENWS 477 or graduate/professional standing
